title: CacheStatus
description: GET /cache-status — aggregate + per-root warm progress, live prefetcher state, capacity verdict, and in-flight scans. Grounded in origin/main (CacheStatus bridge/cbridge.go:2046). NORMALIZATION REQUIRED (JM-3): the inner aggregate/roots/live structs (pin.AggregateStats store.go:490, RootSummary store.go:440, LiveStats prefetcher.go:372) still carry NO json tags on main, so they marshal with capitalized Go field names. v1 specifies snake_case via added json tags; the fixtures are the TARGET (snake_case) form. capacity and scanning ALREADY carry snake_case tags and are always present.

roots.description: Per-pin-root summaries; null/absent when no pin roots.

live.description: Live prefetcher state (pin.LiveStats). Zero-valued when prefetcher is nil.

cache_used_bytes.description: TRUE total on-disk JuiceFS block-cache size in bytes — the honest 'cache used' number. Sourced from the juicefs_blockcache_bytes gauge (every block read, NOT only pinned), falling back to a du of the cache dir when the gauge is unavailable. This is a SUPERSET of aggregate.cached_bytes (which is pinned-resident only). Consumers should display this as 'cache used' (pair with capacity.cache_capacity_bytes), and treat aggregate.cached_bytes/total_bytes strictly as the pinned-resident readiness fraction. ADDITIVE/optional: an older core omits this field (decode as 0); no contract_version bump.
cache_used_bytes.$comment: Optional (not in required) so a pre-fix core that omits it still validates.

computed_sec.description: Unix seconds the verdict was computed.

scanning.description: pin.ScanningRoot[] (scanning.go:24) — in-flight pin-tree scans. Normalized to [] (never null).
